title: Kunjungan Dokter: Gejala dan Resep
opening: Selamat pagi, Bapak/Ibu. Silakan duduk. Ada yang bisa saya bantu?

t1.prompt: Selamat pagi, Bapak/Ibu. Silakan duduk. Ada yang bisa saya bantu?
t1.promptTranslation: Selamat pagi (Selamat pagi) — Good morning, sir/madam. Please have a seat. How can I help you?

t2.prompt: Baik, bisa Anda ceritakan lebih detail tentang apa yang Anda rasakan? Sejak kapan gejala ini muncul dan seberapa parah?
t2.promptTranslation: Baik (Baik) — Okay, could you tell me more details about what you're feeling? Since when have these symptoms appeared, and how severe are they?

t3.prompt: Oh, begitu. Sudah berapa lama Anda mengalami gejala tersebut? Ada riwayat alergi obat atau sedang mengonsumsi obat-obatan lain saat ini?
t3.promptTranslation: Oh, begitu (Oh, begitu) — Oh, I see. How long have you been experiencing these symptoms? Do you have any history of drug allergies or are you currently taking any other medications?

t4.prompt: Baik, dari gejala yang Anda sampaikan, kemungkinan Anda mengalami infeksi ringan. Saya akan meresepkan beberapa obat untuk meredakan gejala dan mempercepat pemulihan Anda. Pastikan Anda meminumnya sesuai anjuran, ya.
t4.promptTranslation: Alright, based on the symptoms you've described, it's likely you have a mild infection. I will prescribe some medication to relieve your symptoms and speed up your recovery. Please make sure you take them as directed, okay?

t5.prompt: Sama-sama. Jika dalam beberapa hari gejala tidak membaik atau justru memburuk, jangan ragu untuk kembali kontrol. Semoga lekas sembuh.
t5.promptTranslation: You're welcome. If the symptoms don't improve or even worsen in a few days, please don't hesitate to come back for a follow-up. Get well soon.

t-repeat.prompt: Mohon maaf, bisa diulang? Saya tidak begitu jelas mendengar.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: I'm sorry, could you please repeat that? I didn't quite catch it clearly.
